title: rubus peltinervius
intro: Rubus peltinervius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus peltinervius include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and prevent certain types of cancer due to its high antioxidant capacity. Rubus peltinervius can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections.
